title: State transition map
human_acceptance_or_explicit_next_goal_b: Next boundary recorded as RP00.P01.M05.S11 Validation helper; no sensitive production action approved by this subphase.

findings.title: HUMAN_APPROVAL_TRANSITION_EVIDENCE_KEYS export was not enumerated in contract required_exports
findings.details: Claude noted the evidence-key export existed and was tested but was not included in the contract required_exports list for S10.
findings.recommendation: Add HUMAN_APPROVAL_TRANSITION_EVIDENCE_KEYS to required_exports and validator export checks, or accept the extra export as non-contractual.
findings.evidence: contracts/control-plane-contract.json now lists HUMAN_APPROVAL_TRANSITION_EVIDENCE_KEYS in human_approval_state_transition_map_definition.required_exports; scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs requires the export; model tests already assert the deduped keys.

findings.title: Declarative guard_policy enforcement is deferred to S11 validation helper
findings.details: Claude noted S10 declares guard policy flags and transition helpers but does not yet enforce evidence objects for each transition.
findings.recommendation: Keep this as an explicit S11 validation-helper responsibility.
findings.evidence: HUMAN_APPROVAL_STATE_TRANSITION_MAP.validationHelperCompletionSubphase, contract transition_policy.validation_helper_completion_subphase, fixture validation_helper_completion_subphase, README, and construction inspection all record RP00.P01.M05.S11 as the enforcement boundary.
